relations.evidence: To enable check printing from Odoo, navigate to Accounting --> Configuration --> Settings and find the Vendor Payments section.
From here, tick the Checks checkbox to reveal several fields for check configuration.
Select a pre-printed or blank Check Layout from the drop-down menu:
Next, choose whether or not to enable the Multi-Pages Check Stub checkbox.
Optionally set a Check Top Margin and Check Left Margin, if required.
Optionally set a Check Top Margin and Check Left Margin, if required.
